mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts below 550,000 units signals a weakening supply cycle that reduces the risk premium applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or HOUST does not decline below 550,000 units within 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 9.2% signals a strengthening labor market that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real disposable personal income above 3.5% signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below 90 signals a weakening supply cycle that reduces the risk premium applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or INDPRO does not decline below 90 within 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 4.5% and a 3-month decline in real disposable personal income below 3.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 9.2% and a 3-month increase in initial claims above 400,000 signals a strengthening labor market that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
